Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 13, 2026

1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy explains how Atlas Mega Ventures LLC, operating UseClevr ("UseClevr," "we," "us," or "our"), collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects personal information when you access or use our website, applications, software, and related services (collectively, the "Service").

2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following categories of information:

a. Account Information

When you register or use the Service, we may collect:

  • name
  • email address
  • authentication credentials or login-related information
  • account preferences
  • billing or subscription-related information, where applicable

b. User Data

We process the files, datasets, prompts, reports, messages, and other content you upload, submit, generate, or store through the Service ("User Data").

c. Usage Information

We may collect information regarding how you interact with the Service, including:

  • pages viewed
  • features used
  • requests submitted
  • prompts, queries, and analysis interactions
  • user actions taken within the platform

d. Technical Information

We may automatically collect technical and device-related information such as:

  • IP address
  • browser type and version
  • device type
  • operating system
  • referral URLs
  • timestamps
  • log data
  • crash and diagnostic information

e. Payment Information

If you purchase paid services, payment processing may be handled by third-party payment providers. We may receive limited transaction-related information, such as billing status, subscription type, and payment confirmation metadata. We do not necessarily store full payment card details ourselves.

3. How We Use Information

We may use the information we collect to:

  • provide, operate, maintain, and improve the Service
  • authenticate users and manage accounts
  • process uploaded data and analysis requests
  • generate reports, analytics, forecasts, summaries, and related outputs
  • communicate with you regarding your account, support, billing, updates, or service notices
  • monitor usage, performance, and security
  • prevent abuse, fraud, unauthorized access, and technical misuse
  • enforce our Terms and other policies
  • comply with legal, regulatory, and contractual obligations

4. Legal Bases for Processing

Where required by applicable law, including the GDPR, we process personal data on one or more of the following legal bases:

  • performance of a contract
  • legitimate interests
  • compliance with legal obligations
  • consent, where required

5. How We Share Information

We do not sell your personal information to advertisers.

We may share personal information and User Data:

  • with service providers and vendors that help us operate the Service
  • with infrastructure, hosting, analytics, authentication, storage, payment, communication, and support providers
  • when required by law, legal process, regulation, or government request
  • to protect the rights, safety, security, users, or integrity of the Service
  • in connection with a merger, acquisition, restructuring, financing, sale of assets, or similar business transaction

Third-party service providers are expected to access information only as necessary to provide services on our behalf and subject to appropriate confidentiality and security obligations.

6. Data Retention

We retain personal information and User Data for as long as reasonably necessary to:

  • provide the Service
  • maintain your account
  • comply with legal, tax, accounting, or regulatory obligations
  • resolve disputes
  • enforce agreements
  • protect the security and integrity of the Service

Retention periods may vary depending on the nature of the information and the applicable purpose.

7. Data Security

We implement reasonable technical, administrative, and organizational measures designed to protect personal information and User Data from unauthorized access, loss, misuse, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

8. International Data Transfers

Your information may be processed and stored in countries outside your country of residence, including countries that may have different data protection laws.

Where required, we take appropriate steps intended to ensure lawful and adequate protection for such transfers.

9. Your Rights

Depending on your location and applicable law, you may have the right to:

  • access the personal data we hold about you
  • request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
  • request deletion of your personal data
  • request restriction of processing
  • object to certain processing
  • request portability of your data
  • withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
  • lodge a complaint with a competent supervisory authority

To exercise these rights, contact us at start@useclevr.com.

10. GDPR, EEA, UK, and Similar Rights

If you are located in the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, Switzerland, or another jurisdiction with similar protections, we will handle qualifying privacy requests in accordance with applicable law.

If required for specific business, enterprise, or regulatory purposes, additional data processing terms may be made available upon request.

11. Children's Privacy

The Service is not directed to children, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age required by applicable law to consent to data processing. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

12. Third-Party Services

The Service may rely on third-party services, integrations, and infrastructure providers. Those providers may process information in accordance with their own privacy policies and contractual commitments.

13. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make material changes, we may provide notice by updating the date above, posting notice in the Service, or using other reasonable means.

Your continued use of the Service after the revised Privacy Policy becomes effective constitutes acceptance of the updated policy to the extent permitted by law.

14. Contact Us

If you have questions, requests, or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:

Atlas Mega Ventures LLC

Email: start@useclevr.com
